instruction: The outage update still needs to reach @manager on slack. Please review what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the outage next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a quick recap afterward.
canonical_instruction: I need the outage update out to @manager on slack. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the outage next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.
instruction_variants: Can you post the outage update to @manager on slack? Check what's already being tracked on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a recap.
Please get the outage update out to @manager on slack, look over the outage next step on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a recap.
Can you handle the outage update for @manager on slack? Review what's already being tracked on the board, add only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a quick recap.
Please push the outage update to @manager on slack, check whether the outage next step is already on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a short recap.

I need the outage update out to @manager on slack. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the outage next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.

Please get the outage update to @manager on slack, check the outage next step on the board first to see whether it is already there, add only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a recap when it's handled.
Please handle the outage update for @manager on slack, look over the outage next step on the board, add only the missing piece, and send bob@example.com a short recap when it's done.

hidden_constraints.value: The escalation is posted and being tracked.

solution_commands: openclaw message send --channel slack --target @manager --message 'Outage escalation started. Please acknowledge.'
email send --to bob@example.com --subject 'Outage escalation recap' --body 'The escalation is posted and being tracked.'
